title: One-pore synthesis of ionic nanogel osmotic power generators
authors: Makusu Tsutsui
Akihide Arima
Denis Garoli
Baba Yoshinobu
Tomoji Kawai
abstract: Published online: 20 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s43246-026-01242-6 Selective ion transport is fundamental to technologies including water desalination and sustainable energy generation, yet achieving high selectivity and permeability in nanoporous membranes is a challenge. Here, a voltage-directed in-pore gelation strategy is used to create ultrathin ionic nanogels within solid-state SiNx nanopores.
